name: Noodles in Broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook udon noodles according to package instructions. Drain and rinse under cold water.
2. Heat the chicken broth in a large pot over medium heat until simmering.
3. Add cubed cooked chicken, grated carrot, sliced green onions, celery, and bok choy to the hot broth.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Simmer for 5-10 minutes or until vegetables are barely tender.
6. Divide noodles among six bowls.
7. Ladle the prepared soup into each bowl.
